meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for SaaS Scaling
content.seo_description: Break through the beginner ceiling. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade SaaS applications. Intermediate level.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are building isolated features rather than scalable systems. The Antigravity project template provides the production-ready architecture you lack. By combining this modular framework with Claude Code’s autonomous engineering, you bypass boilerplate fatigue, allowing you to focus on high-impact business logic and professional software deployment.
content.intro:
The screen glows with the same static To-Do list app you’ve built three times before. You feel the crushing weight of 'tutorial hell'—that invisible wall separating students from engineers who actually ship software. You understand the syntax, but the leap to a production-grade, multi-service architecture feels like trying to bridge a canyon with a toothpick.

It is time to stop building apps and start engineering products. The Antigravity template isn't just code; it is a battle-tested blueprint for SaaS scalability. When you fuse this with the raw power of Claude Code, you cease to be a coder typing lines and become an architect commanding an autonomous development lifecycle.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces separation of concerns, ensuring your frontend, backend, and database logic remain decoupled.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new enterprise-grade project using the Antigravity base template, including modular controller patterns and environment-specific configuration files.

steps.title: Configure Schema-First Data Modeling
steps.description: Define your database models using Antigravity's type-safe schema generator to prevent runtime errors and ensure strict data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a relational database schema for a SaaS user-subscription model including role-based access control (RBAC) and audit logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate schema for subscription and RBAC'

steps.title: Implement Middleware and Security
steps.description: Secure your API endpoints by injecting Antigravity middleware, which handles authentication and request validation automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply JWT authentication middleware to all routes in the /api/v1 namespace and ensure rate limiting is enabled.

steps.title: Build the Business Logic Engine
steps.description: Transition from basic CRUD to complex event-driven logic using Antigravity's service-layer abstraction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for processing payments and triggering post-purchase event notifications using the Antigravity event emitter.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate the deployment pipeline, ensuring your environment variables and build steps are perfectly synced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline configuration for production deployment, including automated linting and integration test execution.

pro_tips: Always treat your database schema as the 'single source of truth' before writing a single line of frontend code.
Use Claude Code to write your integration tests first; this creates a safety net that allows for aggressive refactoring.
Never hardcode environment variables; utilize Antigravity’s .env.vault system to manage secrets across dev and prod environments.
Modularize your UI components using Antigravity’s design tokens to maintain visual consistency as your app scales.
Monitor your API latency from day one by integrating Antigravity's built-in telemetry hooks into your service layer.
resources: System Architecture Patterns for SaaS: https://patterns.dev
content.next_steps: Once your core MVP is deployed, begin mapping your user analytics to your service layer to identify bottlenecks, then iterate on performance optimization.
content.conversion_block: Stop building static projects. Start shipping production-ready applications that define your career as a high-level AI engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
